hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, datetime, os; d = json.load(sys.stdin); root = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR', '.'); os.makedirs(os.path.join(root, 'sessions', 'raw'), exist_ok=True); open(os.path.join(root, 'sessions', 'raw', 'tool-calls.jsonl'), 'a').write(json.dumps({'ts': datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).isoformat(), 'tool': d.get('tool_name')}) + chr(10))"
